7050.Name: Goblin Rampage
7050.Desc: A fissure has appeared on the plains, and the Goblins have begun a rampage! The Pioneer Bureau has commissioned adventurers to investigate and clear out the rampaging monsters.

7051.Name: Goblin Rampage
7051.Desc: A fissure has appeared on the plains, and the Goblins have begun a rampage! The Pioneer Bureau has commissioned adventurers to investigate and clear out the rampaging monsters.

7052.Name: Goblin Rampage
7052.Desc: A fissure has appeared on the plains, and the Goblins have begun a rampage! The Pioneer Bureau has commissioned adventurers to investigate and clear out the rampaging monsters.

7053.Name: Goblin Rampage
7053.Desc: A fissure has appeared on the plains, and the Goblins have begun a rampage! The Pioneer Bureau has commissioned adventurers to investigate and clear out the rampaging monsters.

7055.Name: Defeat the Goblin Mage
7055.Desc: A fissure has appeared on the plains, causing the Goblin Mage to become frenzied. The Pioneer Bureau has commissioned adventurers to eliminate the Goblin Mage.

7065.Name: Urgent Delivery
7065.Desc: A courier heading to Andra Resting Post encountered some trouble on the way. The Pioneer Bureau has commissioned adventurers to assist the courier in delivering the goods to the Andra Resting Post.

7070.Name: Light Bridge
7070.Desc: Ancient ruin platforms have appeared near Minsterhorn. The Pioneer Bureau has commissioned adventurers to investigate the platforms.

7072.Name: Light Bridge
7072.Desc: Ancient ruin platforms have appeared near Minsterhorn. The Pioneer Bureau has commissioned adventurers to investigate the platforms.

7075.Name: Demi-Human Q&A
7075.Desc: A demi-human ecology researcher has commissioned adventurers to travel to a southern island on Asteria Plains to complete a Q&A challenge with the demi-human leader.

7076.Name: Demi-Human Q&A
7076.Desc: A demi-human ecology researcher has commissioned adventurers to travel to a southern island on Asteria Plains to complete a Q&A challenge with the demi-human leader.

7077.Name: Demi-Human Q&A
7077.Desc: A demi-human ecology researcher has commissioned adventurers to travel to a southern island on Asteria Plains to complete a Q&A challenge with the demi-human leader.

7085.Name: Boars Run
7085.Desc: At the Creed's base, a Boarlet owner has commissioned adventurers to help catch Boars in the pen.

7090.Name: Suppress the Eruption
7090.Desc: Assist in suppressing the robots to contain the erupting Void Corruption Rifts in the Andra Passage.

7095.Name: Spider Dodge
7095.Desc: An Guild Artisan has created explosive mini-robots and issued a challenge to adventurers: they must avoid the robots in the rift and survive until the end.

8001.Name: Golem Defensive Patrol
8001.Desc: Although humans haven't yet figured out how to activate Golems, some experts have managed to build a few replicas based on the Legacy... reportedly reaching 66% of the original's power. Please assist with testing them and repel the monsters in the rift.

8002.Name: Golem Steel Fist Battle
8002.Desc: To evaluate the melee performance of the replica Golems, civilian Legacy experts have initiated a combat test. Repel the formidable enemies in the rift to complete the final assessment.

8005.Name: Urgent Delivery: Highlands
8005.Desc: The courier has encountered unexpected obstacles in the highlands. Adventurers are needed to escort the supplies and ensure the route stays clear.

8006.Name: Urgent Delivery: Mountains
8006.Desc: The rugged mountain route has become treacherous once again. Adventurers are needed to help the courier navigate the hazards and deliver the supplies safely.

8020.Name: Conflict Resolution: Part I
8020.Desc: When conflict arises among monsters, they call upon the strong to intervene. Choose a side and help suppress the opposition to end the conflict.

8021.Name: Conflict Resolution: Part II
8021.Desc: The conflict has flared up again! This time, both sides want your help. Pick a faction and join the battle to bring the conflict to a decisive end.
